Krym pulses the trigger once she’s lined up a shot, sending a hail of laser bolts flying your way!
fires up her jetpack, using it to boost her towards you like a knight on horseback
lunges through the snow at you
. She lets out a fearsome warcry, echoing across the windy plateau. She leaps the last distance, thrusting the shock-charged tip of the weapon right at your chest!
You leap to the side, tumbling through the snow and letting Krym’s momentum carry her right past you. She kicks off an obsidian pillar, spinning back your way with a wicked glare.

You can’t get out of the way in time, and take a massive blow from the lance. She twists it at the last moment, only using the blunted sides to strike you, but the electric charge on the spearhead still zaps you good!

back to put some distance between you, Krym taps a few buttons on her wrist computer. A moment later, you hear a mechanical buzzing from somewhere nearby; you have just enough time to duck behind a pillar of obsidian stone before a bolt of lightning shoots over your head, leaving an acrid scent in the air. Glancing over, you can see a small black turret has popped up from where it was hidden under the snow. An electro-gun tracks your movements, discharging stun bolts at you whenever you peek your head out of cover.
through the snow
, swinging her lightning spear in a savage overhand blow!

Krym’s strike is slow and predictable, easily dodged. The head of her lance impacts the snow where you’d been standing before, unleashing a shockwave of thunder and lightning that sends snow exploding into the air.

Krym brings her lance down on you hard, slamming into you with bone-shaking force! On contact, the power built up in her erupts in a burst of lightning and a peal of thunder. Every hair stands on end, and a horrible burning smell suffuses the battlefield.
The deafening blast leaves you reeling, trying to catch your balance and failing miserably. You manage to avoid falling over yourself, but the whole world’s still spinning. You’re staggered!
You jump back just as the two-pronged head of the bident grabs at your [pc.armor]. It hooks in for a moment, but you’re able to pull yourself free!
The two-pronged bident’s head hooks into your [pc.armor] and yanks, discharging electricity through your gear and right into you!
Worse, as you’re yelping in pain, Krym twists her spear-haft and pulls, tearing your [pc.armor] halfway off you! Your armor is sundered!
No longer tripped!
Shield up: She braces the weapon on the top of her shield, steadying it as she takes aim.
“Surprise!” Krym laughs, getting cover from you for a moment. “Gotta keep you on your toes, Steele!”
...Which one’s the real one?
on the wings of her burning jetpack

The woman standing between you and the warmth of the camp isn’t terribly imposing in her own right, standing shy of six feet and kitted up in snowy armor that hugs her womanly curves almost like a bodysuit, but she’s packing enough weaponry to arm a small colony. Krym is carrying a crackling energy pike in one hand and a hardlight shield in the other, and you can see a laser pistol slung on one of her hips... and something tells you all those turrets and traps around the arena aren’t off-limits to the feisty Lancer.
Her armor deflects your attack with an alarming ease.
